subcodes.first_line: By the testimony of all divine Books, this is the Day of God and the Cause is His Cause. Through the Most Exalted Word He hath brought forth all from nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشهادت جمیع کتب الهی یوم یوم اللهست و امر امر او بکلمه علیا کل را از عدم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Word of God the cause of creation
